title: pavonia nemoralis
intro: Pavonia nemoralis, also known as the woodland rosy mallow or woodland pavonia, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia nemoralis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Pavonia nemoralis typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
